summary: Verified Documents tab synchronization fix. Both 'What's Needed' and 'Documents' tabs now display identical file counts for DBS Certificate (2 files: Front and Back). File preview modal works correctly from Documents tab.

✅ Navigate to Employees and click first employee profile - SUCCESS
✅ What's Needed tab shows DBS Certificate with 2 files (Front/Back) - SUCCESS
✅ Documents tab shows DBS Certificate with 2 files (Front/Back) - SUCCESS
✅ Both tabs display identical file counts using evidence_files array - SUCCESS
✅ File preview works from Documents tab (Eye icon click opens modal) - SUCCESS
✅ Preview modal shows document with page navigation (Page 1 of 2) - SUCCESS
✅ Download and New Tab buttons available in preview modal - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Documents tab (lines 2898-2899) now correctly uses evidence_files array as single source of truth
Both tabs filter to only active files: allEvidenceFiles.filter(f => !f.status || f.status === 'active')
File count badge shows correct count from evidence_files.length
Individual file entries display file_label or original_filename correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee OCS-0001 (Olakunle Alonge) with DBS Certificate containing 2 files (Front and Back)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Documents tab synchronization issue FIXED. Both 'What's Needed' and 'Documents' tabs now use the same evidence_files array from the backend /api/employees/{id}/compliance-requirements endpoint. DBS Certificate correctly shows 2 files (DBS Certificate Front, DBS Back) in both tabs. File preview modal works correctly with page navigation.
